pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre-Hospitalization cover We will pay for the Pre-hospitalization Medical Expenses incurred during the 60 days immediately before Hospitalization of an Insured Person provided that Claim under Section I.1A.1 or I.1.A.6 is admissible under the Policy.

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Post-Hospitalization cover We will pay for the Post-Hospitalization Medical Expenses incurred upto180 days from the date Insured Person is discharged from Hospital provided that Claim under Section I.
